Typography

Sutairu provides a variety of typographic utilities for styling text semantically or with utility classes. Below is a reference of supported styles.

Style Example HTML Tag CSS Class
Bold Bold text <b> .bold
Italic Italic text <i> .italic
Abbreviation Abbr. <abbr> .td-abbr
Strikethrough Strikethrough <s> .td-l
Underline Underline <u> .td-u
Overline Overline - .td-o
No decoration Not underlined link - .td-none
Small Small <small> -
Monospace Monospace - .ff-mono
Handwritten Handwritten - .ff-handwritten
Highlight Highlighted text <mark> .highlight
Inline code Inline Code <code> -
Keyboard Ctrl + F <kbd> -
Subscript Regularsub <sub> -
Superscript Regularsup <sup> -
Deleted Removed text <del> .td-del
Inserted Added text <ins> .td-ins
Uppercase uppercase text .tt-upper
Lowercase LOWERCASE TEXT .tt-lower
Capitalize capitalize each word .tt-capitalize
Normal case Normal Case .tt-normal
